steps.title: Identify the direct label
steps.content: The blank comes between the adjective "American" and the proper name "Will Barnet." The sentence needs the noun that identifies Barnet's role, followed directly by his name.

steps.title: Remove extra punctuation
steps.content: A colon would introduce an explanation or list, C adds an unnecessary dash, and D wrongly separates the role noun from the name with a comma. A direct identifier needs no punctuation between "artist" and "Will Barnet." The answer is B.
